description: Complete the Demo.tsx split into demo/ subdirectory
prompt:
Complete the split of Demo.tsx. The demo/ subdirectory already exists with: atoms.tsx (C, ICON_MAP, useCountUp, getScoreColor, TrustRing, DashCard, NotifBadgeStyle, NotifBorderColor, ValuePropositionBanner), DemoBanner.tsx, PersonaSelector.tsx, types.ts.

What is NOT yet extracted:
- Lines 358-580: DemoDashboardContent
- Lines 581-676: DemoRelationshipsContent
- Lines 677-783: DemoMatchesContent
- Lines 784-858: DemoVerificationContent
- Lines 859-925: DemoPayoutsContent
- Lines 926-1051: DemoDealRoomsContent
- Lines 1052-1107: DealRoomInteriorModal
- Lines 1108-1241: DemoDashboard
- Lines 1242-1278: export default Demo (the root component)
- Lines 1279-1322: DemoInner

Your task:
1. Read Demo.tsx fully to understand imports and all function signatures
2. Create client/src/pages/demo/DemoContentPages.tsx with lines 358-1107 (DemoDashboardContent through DealRoomInteriorModal) — import shared helpers from './atoms' and types from './types' and DemoBanner from './DemoBanner'
3. Create client/src/pages/demo/index.tsx with lines 1108-1322 (DemoDashboard + Demo + DemoInner) — import from './DemoContentPages', './PersonaSelector', './DemoBanner', './types'
4. Convert Demo.tsx to a 1-line barrel: export { default } from './demo';
5. Run pnpm check and fix any TypeScript errors

All files must be under 800 lines. Preserve all existing logic exactly — no behavior changes.
